model.name: gpt-4o-mini
model.system_prompt:
You are a SPARQL expert for Wikidata.
Generate ONLY valid SPARQL query code.
Do NOT include explanations, comments, code blocks, or any text.
Output ONLY the query starting with SELECT or CONSTRUCT.

prompt.name: agentic
prompt.system_message:
You are an expert Wikidata SPARQL agent.
Your goal is to answer the user question by constructing a valid SPARQL query.

TOOLS:
You have one tool: EXECUTE_SPARQL - run a SPARQL query on Wikidata to verify QIDs, P-IDs, and schema.

RESPONSE FORMAT - use exactly one of these two formats:

FORMAT A (exploratory step):
THOUGHT: <explain what you need to verify>
ACTION: EXECUTE_SPARQL
sparql_start
<your exploratory query>
sparql_end

FORMAT B (final answer):
THOUGHT: <explain why the query is correct>
FINAL_ANSWER:
sparql_start
<your complete query>
sparql_end

RULES:
1. Never guess QIDs or P-IDs - always verify with EXECUTE_SPARQL first.
2. Boolean questions (Is/Was/Did/Are) use ASK in FINAL_ANSWER.
3. SELECT queries always use ?answer as main variable.
4. Dates: use FILTER(YEAR(?date) > 1990).
5. Do not use SERVICE wikibase:label in FINAL_ANSWER.
6. Output only the format above, no extra text.

Standard prefixes available: wd, wdt, p, ps, pq, rdfs, xsd.

results.question: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
results.gold_sparql: PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX geo: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/> PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/> PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/> PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/> PREFIX wds: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/> PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/> PREFIX wdv: <http://www.wikidata.org/value/> PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE { wd:Q761383 wdt:P138 ?result. }

results.question: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
results.gold_sparql: PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX geo: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/> PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/> PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/> PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/> PREFIX wds: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/> PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/> PREFIX wdv: <http://www.wikidata.org/value/> PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {?result wdt:P31 wd:Q16521. ?mop wdt:P31 wd:Q645883; wdt:P710 ?result, wd:Q625657.}

agent_steps.thought: I need to verify the QIDs for the Australian Defence Force and the relevant properties related to military operations to construct a query that identifies animals involved in such operations.
agent_steps.query:
construct a query that identifies animals involved in such operations.
ACTION: EXECUTE_SPARQL
sparql_start
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE {
  { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q729. }  # Instance of animal
  UNION
  { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q5. }    # Instance of human
  UNION
  { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q1860. } # Instance of military unit
}
LIMIT 10
sparql_end
agent_steps.observation: Error executing query: QueryBadFormed: A bad request has been sent to the endpoint: probably the SPARQL query is badly formed.

agent_steps.thought: I need to verify the QIDs for the Australian Defence Force and the relevant properties related to military operations to construct a query that identifies animals involved in such operations. I will start by checking the QID for the Australian Defence Force and the relevant properties.
agent_steps.query:
construct a query that identifies animals involved in such operations. I will start by checking the QID for the Australian Defence Force and the relevant properties.
ACTION: EXECUTE_SPARQL
sparql_start
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE {
  { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q328. }  # Instance of Australian Defence Force
}
LIMIT 10
sparql_end
agent_steps.observation: Error executing query: QueryBadFormed: A bad request has been sent to the endpoint: probably the SPARQL query is badly formed.

agent_steps.thought: I need to verify the QID for the Australian Defence Force (ADF) and the relevant properties related to military operations. I will first check the QID for the ADF to ensure I have the correct identifier before constructing a query to find animals involved in military operations.
agent_steps.observation: Error executing query: QueryBadFormed: A bad request has been sent to the endpoint: probably the SPARQL query is badly formed.

results.schema_hints: P7779 (military unit), P798 (military designation), P3156 (Australian Classification), P410 (military, police or special rank), P4624 (squadron embarked)

results.question: among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
results.gold_sparql: PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX geo: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/> PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/> PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/> PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/> PREFIX wds: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/> PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/> PREFIX wdv: <http://www.wikidata.org/value/> PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {wd:Q11835640 wdt:P674 ?result. ?result wdt:P451 ?p1, ?p2. FILTER(?p1 != ?p2 &&(?result IN (wd:Q4205826, wd:Q4463198)))}

results.question: among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
results.gold_sparql: PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX geo: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/> PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/> PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/> PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/> PREFIX wds: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/> PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/> PREFIX wdv: <http://www.wikidata.org/value/> PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {wd:Q860580 wdt:P112 ?result. ?result wdt:P39 wd:Q10891456.}

results.question: among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
results.gold_sparql: PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX geo: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/> PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/> PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/> PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/> PREFIX wds: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/statement/> PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/> PREFIX wdv: <http://www.wikidata.org/value/> PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?result WHERE {wd:Q696071 wdt:P50 ?author. ?author wdt:P800 ?result. ?result wdt:P921 wd:Q16003532 FILTER(?result != wd:Q69071)}
